title: quintinia kuborensis
intro: Quintinia kuborensis, also known as the Giant Five Corners, is a plant species native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a compound called quassin, a known anti-inflammatory and antimalarial agent. The health benefits of Quintinia kuborensis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a sought-after remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and crushing the bark, then infusing it in hot water to create a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes.
